title: 加拿大讀書就畢業，你問我盡量答

replies.msg:
多倫多讀緊書，就黎畢業
因為最近個新政策好多人問我關於讀書嘅嘢
自己都經歷過搵資料做決定呢個過程
明白會有迷惘但又唔知可以問邊個
所以開個po比大家問吓問題
識答嘅都會盡量答
不過都希望大家唔好做伸手黨

樓主畢業之後有咩打算？
如果怕自爆就 就住黎答

quote.msg: 唐人街啲野食費唔貴？款式、味道、份量如何？

replies.msg:
呢邊有兩個唐人區
Downtown 有一個舊嘅唐人街，我冇係果邊食過嘢
Markham,Richmond hill, Scarborough 係另一個唐人區
嘢食有平有貴
平嘅3.99 in tax(~$24hkd)就有一盒頹飯，大盒到食到兩餐
味道我覺得好過而家香港所謂嘅茶餐廳

replies.msg:
你可以試下係indeed 果啲搵工網send下cv
我唔清楚it行情
但你未有加拿大合法工作嘅身份，又係fg
份cv應該難啲吸引到啲公司要去搞咁多手續申請你過嚟

如果你真係想嚟，不如新政策出咗詳情之後
你申請3年work permit過嚟搵工
做夠一年可以申請pr
（照而家嘅資料睇係，不過都要等詳情出咗先肯定到）
至少你有合法身份做嘢
唔洗間公司做咗多嘢幫你搞個身份嚟做嘢（唔易嫁，點解佢要做咁多嘢請你，而唔請個可以即刻做嘢嘅人）

replies.msg:
睇咩生意，有d同打工無分別，但可expense leased car fee,
true... also watch out for employee and self employed issue. Leased car is not a good tax planning option. There are other way to do that.

Tax 好似要比左basic 先，剩低dividend 時先再比，
for businesses, you have to submit installments for income tax (personal or corporations etc.), payroll taxes and GST ( or HST depending on which province)
Dividends are not a very good tax planning tools now... dividends are
paid out of after tax income earned and retained in a Corporation. If you are self employed but not incorporated, you can not pay dividend.
Most people will pay owners/partners or associates a fixed salary and a management salary at the year end (when you have an idea how did the business do that year) again, watch out for reasonableness of the management fees.

加埋我估低個正常salary tax 卦，
Payroll taxes are deducted from each pay and remit to CRA on the 15th of the next month. The amount required are specified in a payroll tax table. At the end of the calendar year, a T4 will be issued with all the salary you made and taxes you paid. You file an income tax return using this T4 and other income and expenses to arrive at your taxes payable. If your tax on the T4 is higher than your tax payable, then you have a refund otherwise, you owe more taxes..

paid out of after tax income earned and retained in a Corporation. If you are self employed but not incorporated, you can not pay dividend.
Most people will pay owners/partners or associates a fixed salary and a management salary at the year end (when you have an idea how did the business do that year) again, watch out for reasonableness of the management fees.

加埋我估低個正常salary tax 卦，
Payroll taxes are deducted from each pay and remit to CRA on the 15th of the next month. The amount required are specified in a payroll tax table. At the end of the calendar year, a T4 will be issued with all the salary you made and taxes you paid. You file an income tax return using this T4 and other income and expenses to arrive at your taxes payable. If your tax on the T4 is higher than your tax payable, then you have a refund otherwise, you owe more taxes..

replies.msg:
the anti avoidance rules are very simple...

Even if your taxes are filed according to the Income Tax Act.. but we think it "stinks' then we can use "anti avoidance " rules to go after you.

An avoidance transaction is defined in subsection 245(3) as a single transaction or one that is a part of a series of transactions where the single transaction or the series results directly or indirectly in a tax benefit, unless the transaction is carried out primarily for bona fide purposes other than to obtain the tax benefit.

you can not deduct the full rent, utilities, maintenance fee because it include personal use space too e.g. your bedroom (unless your place of business is on the bed. LOL just kidding). e.g. you teach piano at your own house in one of your room.

then, you can possibly deduct 300/1000 of all the rent, utilities and maintenance fees. However, home office are subject to audit all the time.

加拿大人已經好包容無美國佬咁mean.

加拿大唔會唔prefer Canada CPA 多過其他牌？

I have the following designations
Chartered Professional Accountant - CPA
Chartered Accountant- CA
Certified Public Accountant - CPA (New York)

Not everyone in the accounting field has CPA.
There are three types of CPA in Ontario
CPA, CA -Chartered Accountant
CPA, CGA- Certified General Accountant
CPA, CMA- Certified Management Accountant

Contact CPA Ontario
https://www.cpaontario.ca/become-a-cpa/student-support-centre

For CPA, CA, you have to work for a CPA, CA firm
For CPA, CGA and CPA, CMA you don't have to (I guess)

You have to take some courses and write certain exams to meet the qualification requirements.
I was a CPA from New York and had to go through certain process to become a Chartered Accountant in Ontario. Rules have changed and I don't know the current rules for foreign trained accountants..

replies.msg:
I think the Ontario Liberal govt forced them to merge. Many people working in the accounting field do not need the type of mandatory training to become a CPA. I thought CGA was good enough for them.

I have met with over a thousand of accounting department staff in various large and small companies. The majority of the staff do not have any designation. However, most managers/ controllers are CGA and only a handful are CA.

Tax managers are about 50% CA and some CGA.
All my staff are either CA or CGA.

replies.msg:
哈，點解無人問做保安？ 喺香港啲人話搵唔到嘢做就做保安。

講下，condo 樓下近呢一兩年已經全部無白人保安，都係移民黎。做啲嘢除咗基本嘢，仲有簽收收包裹，officer hour 以外所有緊急問題（漏水，嘈音..）都係叫保安上黎，佢再叫相關人士。 職位係 “concierge”.

佢地係保安公司員工，condo好多時會換保安公司，但啲保安就自動過檔去新公司嘅。

入職要讀course 同考牌，Ontario 要讀40個鐘。

啱啱睇到個website 對大家可以搵啲咩工有參考價值

https://helpingnewcomerswork.ca

Canada needs a conservative government to dip out of this mess.

Growing up in HK, I think conservatives is more inline with my values.
I’m just looking from the finance/tax perspective.

Ontario- southern Ontario has many first and second generation immigrants who came here when liberal were in power. I used to be very active in the Toronto area Liberal party and witnessed the strength of the Liberal election machine. Italian, Portuguese, Blacks and most minority support Liberal no matter what.... I was one of them.

Quebec is another major battle ground. They usually vote as a block prior to Quebec separatist . Jack Layton 's NDP became the Official opposition

Conservative needs a good number from Quebec and Ontario to form a Govt. I am not sure if that can be achieved by Otoole.

The story is getting too long..
